title: Half-Life Death Sound Resource Pack
description:
Plays the Half-Life death sound when you die.

Also includes a replacement sound for the totem.
body:
# Half-Life Death Sound in Minecraft
Sounds by Valve and assembled according to `sentences.txt`.

If you've ever wanted to hear the Half-Life Death Sound when you die, then you've come to the right place. Also includes a replacement sound for the totem.

Specific versions don't matter. As long as you use this in a version that [MC-93804](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-93804) is fixed, then this pack works (Java 1.15 and above).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nW6JzKBjwNg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
